description: Canonical center-panel output block types. Edit here to add or rename scroll-area block renderers.

block_types.label: Text block
block_types.notes: Generic prose: workflow intro, branch narration, input waiting

block_types.label: Paragraph context block
block_types.notes: Live focus paragraph summary with reference links

block_types.label: Result summary block
block_types.notes: Workflow completion summary with primary result and conditions

block_types.notes: Symbolic, substituted, and evaluated equation nodes

block_types.label: Table block
block_types.notes: Nomenclature and structured tabular reference blocks
